title: OREGON ZOO - 211info
text: METRO OREGON ZOO OREGON ZOO Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides experiences in education and conservation, botanical gardens, classes, lectures, overnights, volunteer experiences for adults and teens, outreach to schools and retirement centers, and summer concerts. 4001 SW Canyon Road Portland, OR 972219704 Eligibility: Unrestricted Zoo for All: recipients of SNAP/food stamps, Medicaid, Section 8, WIC, free/reduced school lunch, TANF, Head Start, and foster families Hours: Varies (503) 226-1561 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 226-1561 Main phone Main phone (503) 226-1561 Scholarship Information (503) 220-2781 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website; advance ticket reservations are required for all visitors FEES: Zoo for All: Income-eligible households can purchase up to 4 tickets at $13 each Military Discount: $3 off regular admission Regular admission: -Age 12 and older: $26 -Ages 2-11: $21 -Age 2 and under: None DOCUMENTS: Zoo for All: Photo ID and EBT card, Medicaid card, or eWIC card. Must also provide proof of participation in Section 8, free/reduced school lunch, TANF, Head Start programs, or foster home certificate LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet Stop ID 10120, Washington Park MAX Station Services: Camps Wildlife Exhibitions If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
